profile.name: DEMIS RINCON
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.bio: Enthusiastic Senior Architect with over six years of performance-led excellence in orchestrating enterprise-grade ecosystems. I lead the synthesis of high-fidelity web and mobile solutions, specializing in the React manifold. Beyond archival hours, I conduct Protocol Transmission in Cybersecurity at Universidad Vizcaya and Communal Infrastructure Uplink as a mentor at Bright Coders Academy. My tactical focus is maintained through Tactical Neural Simulations and Strategic Artifact Sequence Manipulation (MTG).
profile.quote: Innovation is the bridge between archival legacy and the infinite discovery of the future.

chronicle.description: Leading the mobile dossier architecture for Regulix and Litera AI. As Principal Engineer, I architect complex React Native manifolds using Zustand, optimized hooks, and Nativewind integrations. Orchestrating high-performance PostgreSQL/Prisma backends within containerized unit-environments.

Stabilizing global travel commerce infrastructures via React/Redux-RTK protocols. Pioneered an automated contract testing framework for 150+ core APIs using Postman/Newman. Engineered E2E mission-critical pipelines with Nightwatch and Cucumber. Directing junior unit growth through technical mentorship.

Developed high-impact cross-browser applications for diverse industry titans. Engineered the celebrity brochure cruise app, COOP fleet management HUDs, and data capture systems for Oculus. Specialized in high-performance animations and AWS S3/EC2 integration using GraphQL and Material UI.

Modernized ten internal logistics legacies managing high-confidentiality REST data. Designed and implemented the enterprise's flagship design system from origin, leveraging Next.js, Redux, and SASS to create a scalable, reusable component library.
Engineered sophisticated React components for H Hotels' employee registration modules. Tailored high-efficiency state management registration flows used across global enterprise units.

relics.title: Litera AI
relics.description: An AI-powered legal assistant revolutionizing legal research and documentation through LLM integration and seamless mobile experiences.
contributions: Built ultra-low latency legal chat interface
